MM feed ratios should equal the name as a fraction.

5 points from 0 to 100 should be at 0, 25, 50, 75, 100.

Two holes should be at start and end.
All points at same position when origin == end.
Full circle (360°) should produce exactly holes_count points.
All points should be at radius = diameter/2 from origin.
First point should be at start_angle (0°) = rightmost.
Points should be evenly spaced angularly.
Partial arc (not 360°) should have holes_count + 1 points.
First point at start_angle, last at end_angle.
start_angle=90 should place first point at top.

ratioNum/ratioDen should NOT affect scaled_value in spindle mode.

Non-spindle mode has zero wrap steps, no wrapping.

Helper to create an AxisDispatcher with tmp_path monkeypatched.
Spindle mode does not apply factor (degrees are unit-less).

Spindle mode converts steps to degrees.

1:2 gear — encoder at half spindle speed.
set_current_position converts degrees to steps for offset.
set_current_position works with non-1:1 gear ratio.
InputDispatcher self-computes _spindle_wrap_steps from its own properties.

IDENTITY offset0 no longer modifies input.position — behavioral change.
Offset = value/factor - raw, stored in ratio-units not display-units.
Zero in MM, switch to IN — should still show 0.
Set 25.4mm, switch to IN — should show ~1.0in.
abs_offset adds to raw before tool offset and factor.
Zeroing in ABS mode changes abs_offset, not tool offset.
Zeroing in INC mode changes tool offset, not abs_offset.
After setting tool offsets, ABS recalibration shifts all tools uniformly.
abs_offset stored in ratio-units, factor applied after.
abs_offset works in spindle mode (ratio-units = steps).
Input owns its spindleMode — setting on axis does not propagate to input.
3x3 grid with spacing 25 should be centered: -25 to +25.
Center of all points should be at origin.
Adjacent columns should differ by spacing_x.
Adjacent rows should differ by spacing_y.
90° rotation should swap x and y axes.
Rotation should not change distances between points.
360° rotation should produce same points as 0°.
Servo struct should parse all fields with correct addresses.
Scale (input_t) struct should parse including comma-separated vars.
FastData struct should parse arrays correctly.
Variables should be relative to device, base_address used for I/O.
Device size should equal sum of all field lengths.
register_type should produce a TypeDefinition with correct name.
set_fast_data should map values to variable names.
Array fields should produce lists in fast_data.
Encoder wraps from max uint32 to small value (forward motion).
Encoder wraps from small value back past zero (backward motion).
